auto.viewing_value_copying_json_clearing_cach: Viewing value, copying JSON, and clearing cache require infrastructure manage permissions and will be written to the audit log.

auto.check_meta_information_entry_read_actual: Check the meta information of this entry and do not read the actual value.

auto.encoding_must_globally_unique_modified_c: The encoding must be globally unique and cannot be modified after creation.
auto.cache_provider_support_entry_inspection: The current cache provider does not support entry inspection.
auto.account_access_content: The current account has no access to content.
auto.data_source_description: Manage default modeling states, API exposure policies, and Data Model access surfaces for built-in master data sources and external data sources.
auto.reset_password_temporary_password_needs_: Reset the password of {{value1}} to the default temporary password, which needs to be changed immediately after the user logs in.
auto.currently_model_supplier_instance: There is currently no model supplier instance
auto.available_capabilities_exposed_provider_: Available capabilities are exposed with the provider; cache domains, entries, or values ​​cannot currently be listed.
auto.operation_may_display_user_input_run_log: This operation may display user input, run logs, model output or business records, and will be written to the audit log.
auto.name: Name
auto.sure_want_deactivate_s_account_deactivat: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{value1}}'s account? After deactivation, the user will not be able to log in.

auto.text: 该供应商刚完成版本切换，建议刷新模型并验证关键实例。

auto.leave_blank_retain_key_click_show_view_m: Leave it blank to retain the current key; click Show to view and modify the current value.
auto.unsafe_external_source_notice: unsafe_external_source is a system-derived state and cannot be changed to safe through manual selection.
auto.currently_host_information_display: There is currently no host information to display

auto.discovery_mode_dynamically_pull_list_mod: Discovery mode: Dynamically pull a list of models at runtime.
auto.api_connected_local_moka_cache_store_api: The API is connected to the local Moka cache-store of the current api-server process; no cache domain means that there is no entry in the current process, or the memory cache has been cleared after restarting.
auto.code_stable_identifier_data_model_used_a: Code: A stable identifier for the Data Model, used for APIs, permissions, and internal references; it cannot be edited after creation.
auto.text_alt: 当前主实例还没有接入任何子实例模型
auto.existing_process_node_still_references_p: If the existing process node still references this provider, subsequent error reports are normal; after reinstalling the same provider and restoring the corresponding model, the node can continue to be used again.
auto.title: Title
auto.workspace_s_upgraded_latest_official_ver: The current workspace's {{value1}} will be upgraded to the latest official version {{value2}}. After completion, all instances under the supplier will be migrated uniformly.
auto.sensitive_fields_used_encrypted_storage_: Sensitive fields are only used for encrypted storage and will not be echoed in lists and interfaces.
auto.installation_configuration_activation_sa: Installation, configuration and activation will be saved as pending changes and will take effect after restarting the api-server once.
auto.contract_support_tree_inspection: The current contract does not support tree inspection.
auto.one_new_user_role_same_workspace: There can be only one default new user role in the same workspace.
auto.draft_created_unpublished_state_publishe: draft: draft, created in an unpublished state by default; published: published, allowing entry into the running availability and API exposure judgment; disabled: disabled, not entering the running surface; broken: current definition, running dependencies or external resource exceptions, which need to be repaired before publishing.

auto.latest_official_version_about_installed_: The latest official version {{value1}} is about to be installed. After completion, it will be automatically enabled to the current workspace.
auto.text_option: 还没有配置模型，点击“添加”或使用检测自动导入。

auto.built_in_file_table_cannot_be_deleted: The built-in file table cannot be deleted
auto.supports_one_flowbasepkg_compatible_tar_: Supports `.1flowbasepkg`, compatible with `.tar.gz` / `.zip`. After uploading, the host backend will still uniformly verify and install it.
auto.deletion_all_instances_installation_reco: After deletion, all instances, installation records, and local plug-in files of the provider will be cleaned up.
auto.resetting_password_reset_target_account_: Resetting the password will reset the target account password to the default temporary password and require the user to change it immediately after logging in.
